prestazioni: Engine: 992-generation 3.8L twin-turbo flat-six (9A2 Evo, internal code '9A2/60') with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (8.5 psi boost) paired with a custom Akrapovič 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system featuring dual side-exit quad tips and a valved bypass for off-road sound suppression. Forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods with ARP L19 bolts to handle 750+ hp reliably.

Drivetrain: Reinforced 911 GT3 RS 7-speed PDK transmission with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic) and a Quaife ATB differential (80% lockup) for extreme off-road torque distribution. Custom 40% shorter final drive ratio (4.48:1) via a RuffStuff Specialties billet aluminum transfer case adapter for rock-crawling capability.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (200mm travel front, 220mm rear) and remote reservoirs, paired with custom-fabricated 3-link rear suspension arms (T45 steel) and spherical bearings from NMB Tech. Front sway bar deleted and replaced with a Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) to reduce body roll during high-speed desert runs. BFGoodrich KM3 285/70R17 tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9 +12 offset) with beadlock rings from Raceline Wheels.
estetica: Body: Full custom Safari-style widebody kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) modified for off-road use, featuring hand-beaten aluminum fender flares (2.5-inch wider than stock) with integrated LED light pods (Baja Designs Squadron Pro). Front bumper replaced with a custom steel tube bumper (by Poison Spyder) with a Warn Zeon 12-S winch and a skid plate made from 5mm AR500 steel. Rear bumper features a swing-out tire carrier with a RotopaX 5-gallon fuel cell and a Hi-Lift Jack mount.

Lighting: Full LED conversion with a Baja Designs OnX6 Hybrid LED bar (50-inch) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack (by Front Runner Outfitters) with auxiliary pods (Baja Designs S2 Sport) on the A-pillars. Rear lighting upgraded to Rigid Industries D-Series Pro (amber/red) with a custom wiring harness from Painless Performance for auxiliary brake and turn signals.

Interior: Full custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, T45 steel) with integrated harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Seats replaced with Recaro Cross Sportster CS seats (heated, with 5-point mounting) and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay by Voodoo Motorsports. Steering wheel swapped for a Sparco R383 (suede, 350mm) with a quick-release hub, and the center console features a Motec C127 dash display with off-road-specific data logging (wheel speed, G-forces, and suspension travel).
